comment.description: The "Not now" split button (moz-button) in the save login/card doorhanger; its shadow root holds the more-actions chevron.

comment.description: The dropdown chevron inside the "Not now" split button's shadow root. Clicking it (via js_click_on) opens the more-actions menu that contains "Never save".
comment.location: Shadow DOM of the doorhanger "Not now" split button

comment.description: An individual entry within the autofill dropdown, representing a selectable suggestion such as a name, address, or card number

comment.description: An individual entry within the autofill dropdown, with a label for the "ac-value" attr, usually a cardholder name.
